'''vajoto''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oilfish|oilfish]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-j-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oilfish|oilfish]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| vajoto
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:væjeteth|væjeteth]] || [[word:væjetej|væjetej]] || [[word:væjetesh|væjetesh]] || [[word:væjete|væjete]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:vajojototh|vajojototh]] || [[word:vajojotoj|vajojotoj]] || [[word:vajojotosh|vajojotosh]] || [[word:vajojoto|vajojoto]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:vajototh|vajototh]] || [[word:vajotoj|vajotoj]] || [[word:vajotosh|vajotosh]] || [[word:vajoto|vajoto]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:vajoftoth|vajoftoth]] || [[word:vajoftoj|vajoftoj]] || [[word:vajoftosh|vajoftosh]] || [[word:vajoftof|vajoftof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:vajototho|vajototho]] || [[word:vajotojo|vajotojo]] || [[word:vajotosho|vajotosho]] || [[word:vajotoko|vajotoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:vajototh|vajototh]] || [[word:vajotoj|vajotoj]] || [[word:vajotosh|vajotosh]] || [[word:vajoto|vajoto]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:vajotothol|vajotothol]] || [[word:vajotojol|vajotojol]] || [[word:vajotoshol|vajotoshol]] || [[word:vajotokol|vajotokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:vajotothotho|vajotothotho]] || [[word:vajotojojo|vajotojojo]] || [[word:vajotoshosho|vajotoshosho]] || [[word:vajotoko|vajotoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:vajotothon|vajotothon]] || [[word:vajotojon|vajotojon]] || [[word:vajotoshon|vajotoshon]] || [[word:vajotokon|vajotokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:vajotothoro|vajotothoro]] || [[word:vajotojoro|vajotojoro]] || [[word:vajotoshoro|vajotoshoro]] || [[word:vajotokoro|vajotokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|691fcb1}}
